chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 349 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1617/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 18.04.2025 None present for the petitioners nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. The absence on the part of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that they are no more interested to pursue the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
